ocr_findings.description: Answer key line at page bottom: OCR reads '問題5-21 工 問題5-22 工 問題5-23 工 問題5-24 ウ' — image clearly shows katakana 'エ' (answer choice letter) but OCR substituted kanji '工' (craft/work) for three of the four answers. The answer letter エ and the kanji 工 are visually similar; this substitution would corrupt downstream answer extraction.

reviewer_notes: Page contains 問題5-21 through 5-24 with ア/イ/ウ/エ four-choice format (image shows page number 212). All question stems and choice text are accurately reproduced. The critical error is in the bottom answer-key line where answer letter エ (katakana) is rendered as 工 (kanji) for problems 5-21, 5-22, 5-23 — a known OCR confusion pattern for this character pair.
